creator: redchin@gmail.com
text:
the mplayer currently in ports does not have pulseaudio output

Fix: 

I have a patch that I have been using for the last six months, but I forget where I got it from. I think it may have been from debian or ubuntu. I can post the patch if requested, but I assume code of unknown province is not welcomed.
How-To-Repeat: install mplayer from ports, run pulseaudio, mplayer -ao pulse doesn't work
